stories.headline: After weeks of speculation, Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce wed in New York - NPR
stories.summary: Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed on Friday, as dozens of black cars dropped off elegantly dressed guests outside of Madison Square Garden in New York City. The wedding bas…

stories.headline: Behind the ‘Supergirl’ Bomb: Competing Cuts, Creative Differences (Exclusive) - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: For months, DC Studios knew the film wasn't working. Things came to a head in March when the studio tested its own cut against one from filmmaker Craig Gillespie.

stories.headline: Dolly Parton asks Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their firstborn child in thank-you video: 'One special baby' - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Dolly Parton asked Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce if she could have their firstborn child in a thank-you video for their $2 million donation to her Imagination Library charity ahead of their wedding.

stories.headline: ‘Minions & Monsters’ Taking On The World With $62M+ WW Cume To Date – Box Office Update - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Minions & Monsters' after two days in the U.S. and its launch abroad stands at $53M worldwide.
